data.title: Crypto Presale Fatigue Sets In While XRP Tundra Offers Real Utility Through Proven Staking Yields
data.description:
The crypto market has entered a phase of heavy presale saturation. After two years of near-constant token launches, investor fatigue is rising sharply as fewer projects reach full deployment. Many presales that gained rapid early momentum never delivered functioning products, creating a cycle where speculation outpaced actual utility. This shift is now shaping how capital […]
source: https://cryptopotato.com/crypto-presale-fatigue-sets-in-while-xrp-tundra-offers-real-utility-through-proven-staking-yields/

data.title: Conversational AI app 2Wai faces criticisms over ethics
data.description:
Artificial intelligence application 2Wai has faced criticisms from the wider online public over claims that it is exploiting mourners. The application is a product of an artificial intelligence startup founded by a former Disney Channel actor, and allows users to create interactive replicas of deceased loved ones. The application was created by founder and creator […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/conversational-ai-app-2wai-faces-criticisms-over-ethics/

data.title: An address spent $5,528,000 to buy 1,760 ETH at an average price of $3,141 per ETH.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, address 0x1fc...FAEd5 borrowed $9.41 million to buy at the bottom 5 hours ago, and finally spent $5.528 million to buy 1760 ETH at an average price of $3141. The remaining pending orders were not filled. He currently holds more than 60 million USDT0 and $68.68 million worth of ETH.

data.title: Wall Street hedge funds ease off the Magnificent Seven in third-quarter reshuffle
data.description:
Wall Street’s biggest hedge funds dumped chunks of their “Magnificent Seven” tech holdings during the third quarter of 2025, cutting down positions in Nvidia, Amazon, Alphabet, and Meta as shown in new regulatory filings published Friday. The pullback came just as markets were gaining steam, with the S&P 500 up nearly 8% and the Nasdaq […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wall-street-hedge-funds-ease-off-the-mag7/

data.title: Did Michael Saylor dump $4 billion Bitcoin?
data.description:
As cryptocurrency markets continue to face downward sentiment, on-chain data sparked speculation over whether Michael Saylor’s company, Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), had off-loaded billions of dollars worth of Bitcoin (BTC) this week. However, new evidence shows the movements were not sales,  they were part of a large-scale custodial migration quietly unfolding for two weeks. On November 14, blockchain analytics firm Arkham detected a massive cluster of transactions involving Strategy-linked wallets. Since midnight UTC, the company shifted 43,415 BTC, roughly $4
source: https://finbold.com/did-michael-saylor-dump-4-billion-bitcoin/

data.title: Founders Fund, founded by Silicon Valley mogul Peter Thiel, reduced its holdings of ETHZilla stock.
data.description: According to filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Founders Fund, a venture capital firm led by billionaire and top Silicon Valley investor Peter Thiel, held 928,389 shares of Ethereum treasury company ETHZilla as of September 30, 2025, representing 5.6% of ETHZilla's stock. This represents a 1.9% reduction in ETHZilla shares by September 30, compared to the 7.5% stake reported on August 4.

data.title: Kraken Reveals the Truth: The Future of Crypto Isn’t Bitcoin’s Price
data.description:

source: https://www.ethnews.com/kraken-reveals-the-truth-the-future-of-crypto-isnt-bitcoins-price/

data.title: Skybridge Capital founders and Solari Capital have invested over $100 million in American Bitcoin.
data.description: Fortune magazine revealed that Solari Capital, the venture capital firm founded by Skybridge founder Anthony Scaramucci and his son AJ Scaramucci, participated in a $220 million funding round in July for American Bitcoin, a Bitcoin mining company associated with the Trump family. Solari Capital invested over $100 million, and Anthony Scaramucci himself also invested a smaller amount, but both declined to disclose the specific investment amounts. (Fortune)
